app.tagline: Your private research assistant · Verifiable insights from public data
app.watchlistEmpty: No symbols yet. Enter a ticker and tap “+ Add current”.
app.historyLocked: Free tier: latest report only. Upgrade to Pro {{pro}} for full history.
app.loadingHint: Web search and drafting may take up to a minute.
app.errSessionStale: Session expired. Please sign in again (required after a server redeploy).
app.errGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
app.historyLockedItem: Full history is a Pro feature — upgrade to unlock
app.watchlistFull: Watchlist full ({{cap}} symbols). Upgrade to Pro for 20, or Pro+ for 100.
app.upgradePro: Pro · {{price}} · Unlimited runs + Claude Haiku 4.5 + full history
app.upgradeProPlus: Pro+ · {{price}} · Claude Sonnet 4.5 + 100 watchlist + critic review
app.disclaimer: This tool summarizes public information and scenarios for reference only. Not investment advice. You are responsible for your own decisions.

auth.loginSub: Sign in to your Wenap account
auth.registerSub: 5 free analyses per month, no credit card
auth.loginInstead: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.verifySentTo: We sent a verification link to {{email}}
auth.verifyCheckInbox: Please check your inbox and click the link to verify.
auth.forgotSub: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.forgotSent: Reset link sent — check your inbox

accuracy.subtitle: All predictions are public, including incorrect ones
accuracy.defHold: Hold → accurate if 30-day change is between -5% and +5%
accuracy.dedup1: One prediction per ticker per 30-day window (by analysis date)
accuracy.dedup2: After verification, a new prediction can be recorded

landing.headline: Research any stock in 60 seconds
landing.subheadline: Wenap synthesizes earnings, news, technicals and supply chain data into a structured report — with scenarios, risks, and a clear signal.
landing.fineprint: 5 free analyses/month. No credit card required.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to decide faster
landing.featureFastSub: Multi-source synthesis in one structured report.
landing.featureScenarioSub: Probabilities, price ranges, and trigger conditions.
landing.featureSixSub: Earnings, Growth, Valuation, Momentum, Policy, Sentiment.
landing.featureSupplySub: Key suppliers, customers, and rivals — linked and scored.
landing.featureAccuracySub: Every prediction logged. Verified at expiry. No cherry-picking.
landing.featureLanguagesSub: English, 中文, 日本語, 한국어, Deutsch, 繁體中文.
landing.freeDesc: 5 analyses/month with Gemini Flash Lite. Great for getting started.
landing.proDesc: Unlimited analyses with Claude Haiku 4.5. Deeper reasoning and full history.
landing.proPlusDesc: Claude Sonnet 4.5, critic review, PDF export, 200 watchlist symbols.

settings.title: Settings
settings.manageNote: Manage your subscription, change plan, or cancel via Stripe.
settings.stripeNotConfigured: Billing not configured. Email {{email}} to manage your subscription.
settings.portalError: Failed to open billing portal. Please try again.
settings.referralNote: Share your link. Both you and your friend get 1 month Pro when they sign up.

sample.banner: This is a public sample report. Sign up to run analyses on any ticker.
sample.notFound: No sample report available for this ticker yet. Check back soon.

compare.title: Compare Tickers
compare.lockedNote: Side-by-side AI comparison is a Pro+ exclusive feature.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you need deeper analysis.
pricing.stripeNotConfigured: Online payment not available yet. Email {{email}} to upgrade.
pricing.upgradeError: Something went wrong, please try again
pricing.faq1A: Yes. Cancel at any time from your account settings. You keep access until the end of the billing period.
pricing.faq2A: Your account downgrades to Free at the end of the current billing period. Your history and watchlist are preserved.
pricing.faq3A: Payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI-compliant payment provider. We never store your card details.

report.scenarioOutside: Price is outside scenario ranges; wait for a clearer direction.
report.targetMismatch: Target price may not align with the bull scenario; verify data.
report.compareComingSoon: Compare feature coming soon — available in Pro+

pro.eventsTeaser: {{count}} events compiled — upgrade to view full timeline

proPlus.scenarioTeaser: Scenario refinement · trigger price & time window…
proPlus.supplyTeaser: Supply chain thesis · linked ticker analysis…
proPlus.critiqueSub: A second AI pass identified these potential blind spots in the analysis:
